summary: Tested teacher/student role-based data scoping. Backend: 14/14 tests passed - teacher sees only own data in workload/courses/students APIs, student /api/students/me works. Frontend: All features working correctly - teacher workload hides filters (title 'نصاب تدريسي'), attendance overview hides dept filter, student report auto-loads own data, teacher has correct 4 tabs (Home, Courses, My Lectures, Profile) with no Admin tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Teacher workload endpoint (line 5233) correctly filters by teacher_record_id when role=teacher
Backend: get_user_scope_filter properly scopes courses/students for teacher role
Frontend: report-teacher-workload.tsx uses isTeacher check (line 61) to hide filters with {!isTeacher && (...)}
Frontend: report-attendance-overview.tsx uses isTeacher check (line 87) to hide department filter
Frontend: report-student.tsx uses isStudent check (line 33) with fetchMyReport() auto-loading
Frontend: _layout.tsx correctly shows my-lectures tab for teachers (line 184: href: isTeacher ? undefined : null)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All role-based data scoping features are working. Teacher sees only their own data in reports with filters hidden. Student report auto-loads. Teacher bottom tabs correctly show 4 tabs (Home, Courses, My Lectures, Profile) without Admin. The My Lectures tab issue from iteration_26 has been RESOLVED - it now shows correctly.

backend_api_tests.teacher_workload_scoped: PASS - /api/reports/teacher-workload returns only 1 teacher record (their own)
backend_api_tests.teacher_students_scoped: PASS - /api/students returns only students in teacher's courses
backend_api_tests.compare_teacher_vs_admin: PASS - Teacher sees fewer records than admin (scope filtering works)

frontend_tests.teacher_login_ui: PASS - Teacher can login via UI
frontend_tests.teacher_dashboard: PASS - Shows teacher name حسن صالح
frontend_tests.teacher_workload_filters_hidden: PASS - Title is 'نصاب تدريسي', NO dept/teacher filters visible
frontend_tests.teacher_attendance_overview_filter_hidde: PASS - Title is 'تقرير حضور مقرراتي', NO dept filter
frontend_tests.teacher_bottom_tabs: PASS - Shows Home, Courses, My Lectures, Profile (4 tabs)
frontend_tests.teacher_admin_tab_hidden: PASS - No Admin tab for teacher
frontend_tests.teacher_my_lectures_tab_works: PASS - My Lectures tab clickable and shows content
frontend_tests.student_login_ui: PASS - Student can login via UI
frontend_tests.student_report_auto_loads: PASS - Title is 'تقرير حضوري', own report auto-loaded
